case_title: EDWIN CAYABYAB VS. HWA MAY MARKET INC. DBA PACIFIC SUPERMARKET

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAYABYAB, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT HWA MAY MARKET INC. DBA PACIFIC SUPERMARKET
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-28-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HWA MAY MARKET INC. DBA PACIFIC SUPERMARKET
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAYABYAB, EDWIN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAYABYAB, EDWIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HWA MAY MARKET INC. DBA PACIFIC SUPERMARKET THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO MAINTAIN THE SUBJECT LIGHT POLE, OR THAT DEFENDANT MAINTAINED A DANGEROUS CONDITION ON ITS PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLTF. COPY OF SAME WITH "ANSWER" MAILED TO DEFT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CAYABYAB, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT HWA MAY MARKET INC. DBA PACIFIC SUPERMARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAYABYAB, EDWIN
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF CAYABYAB, EDWIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HWA MAY MARKET INC. DBA PACIFIC SUPERMARKET
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
